collision energy: with resolution set up at 15,000 and a normalized collision energy of 28
fractionation method: centrifuged on a sucrose density gradient consisting of 400 µL fractions of 20%, 24%, 28%, 32%, 36%, 40%, 44%, 48%, 52%, 56%, and 60% sucrose
fragmentation method: subsequent HCD MS/MS scans of the 20 most abundant ions
instrument: into a QExactive HF Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: eluted directly (~ 350 nL min−1) via a Triversa Nanomate nanospray source
